summary: Iteration 10 verified end-to-end. Backend /api/places/{id}/similar returns 4 same-category places with different ids (Bar Basso: all category=bar, same-city Milan preferred first then others by sentiment desc: 8.9(Milan),9.5,9.1,8.9). Non-existent id returns 404. Route order correct — /places/{id} still returns 200. Frontend PlaceDetail shows 'similar-section' with 4 PlaceCards. Video modal prev/next/wraparound all functional; iframe src changes correctly on next (poWhz -> uRCHK), returns on prev, and wraps (prev from index 0 -> different last video 1J9Ma). Close button works. No console errors.
